FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Geopolitical Tensions and Strong US Consumer Confidence Support Bullish Outlook
tldr_points: US consumer confidence beats forecasts, underpinning USD strength
Geopolitical frictions heighten safe‑haven demand for JPY, yet risk‑off bias favors USD in short‑term
Technical profile shows bullish bias with support at 158.50 and upside potential toward 162.00
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY bullish on strong US confidence, geopolitical risk, and technical support near 158.5.
FX.comment: Bullish on strong US confidence, rate differential, and technical support at MA20.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Fundamental Momentum Outweighs Tech Sell-Off
tldr_points: Coca-Cola earnings signal resilience amid macro uncertainty
AI-driven tech sell-off creates dislocation in high-float tech
Semiconductor weakness temporarily lowers volatility premium
STOCKS.excerpt: Fundamental strength in earnings and growth stocks supports S&P 500 despite tech headwinds.
STOCKS.comment: Fundamental strength in earnings and growth stocks supports S&P 500 despite tech headwinds.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Regulatory Tailwinds and Infrastructure Scaling Offset Near-Term Earnings Volatility
tldr_points: CFTC-Polymarket discussions signal advancing US regulatory clarity for crypto derivatives
Lightning Network upgrades and AI trading agents expand Bitcoin utility and retail order flow
Institutional bullishness on crypto data centers offsets near-term earnings volatility at major players
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD bullish on CFTC talks, Lightning scaling, and institutional infra bets despite Q1 earnings volatility.
CRYPTO.comment: Cautiously bullish on CFTC regulatory talks, Lightning Network scaling, and institutional data center bullishness, pending technical data validation.
